channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti, 7th March
item.description:
Old Kent Road junction of Ilderton Road Remove graffiti from illuminated bollard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Kent Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 inch potholes along Chislehurst Road, 7th March
item.description:
Pothole has been there for more than 6 months. It was caused damage to my car costing hundreds of pounds

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9-11, Chislehurst Road, Goddington, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive pothole, 7th March
item.description:
There’s a massive pot hole and I saw a few cars end up damaged after going over it. It is right on the speed bump opposite the pharmacy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 115, Abbey Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 7th March
item.description:
864 Old Lent Road this is near the front of the park. Remove graffiti from pillar

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 864, Old Kent Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep Pothole on inside lane, 7th March
item.description:
On Friday 27th, I hit a pot hole hard enough to blow my drivers side tyre. Its directly in the standard road positioning for someone driving in the inside lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southend Arterial Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped sofa, 7th March
item.description:
A sofa has been fly tipped on the corner of Dowlas Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dowlas Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicles outside 13 Palace Grove, 7th March
item.description:
This vehicle looks abandoned and is collecting tickets has not seemed to.move for months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace Grove, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crate, soft and bits fly tipped, 7th March
item.description:
Fly tipped stuff

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Hamilton Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 7th March
item.description:
864 Old Kent Road Remove graffiti from Pillar

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 864, Old Kent Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drainage causing standing water on estate, 7th March
item.description:
Large amount of standing water on the roof area on Hamilton Estate , likely caused by blocked or inadequate drainage. There is also what appears to be a rubbish bag and dumped plastic/tarp material and debris preventing water from draining properly. Please can it be sorted asap , making the estate look run down.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hamilton Square, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffito, 7th March
item.description:
Aldi 840 Old Kent Road Remove graffiti from windows

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leo Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead pigeon, 7th March
item.description:
Large dead pigeon on the walk way outside the garden of 6 Gillison walk
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned home, 7th March
item.description:
This abandoned house that is being used as a tip and has dumped furniture in it's garden now has been broken into..the door in the photo has been open for weeks now. Please can it be looked at and the dumped rubbish cleared. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace Grove, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned furniture fly tipping, 7th March
item.description:
Large sofa abandoned on the pavement upper clapton road - fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Upper Clapton Road, Clapton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of rubbish around bin area on Porlock Street, 7th March
item.description:
Rubbish has been left on the ground around the bin area and is scattered across the floor ( next to Southwark Inclusive Learning Centre). The area needs to be cleared asap to prevent further mess and potential pests. Making the neighbourhood look run down.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Porlock Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged lamp post supporting street sign, 7th March
item.description:
The Lamp post supporting the street sign at the entrance to the small surface car park had been hit and forced the sign to warp. The lamp post is distorted. It needs straightening up which will fetch the sign back into its correct place. A lick of paint would not go amiss either.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jenner Close, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 7th March
item.description:
In front of Lennie house, 34 Picton street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brisbane Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This is not working, 7th March
item.description:
Every other day, a piles of litters outside the bin. Not sure what to say.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Down, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green bin needs removing, 7th March
item.description:
Green bin has been here for weeks. It doesn't belong to anyone and people are just putting rubbish on top, please remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hainault Street, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone is repeatedly not cleaning up dog mess in Cottage Field Close. The sane dog appears to have fouled at the 269 bus stop on Foots Cray Lane., 7th March
item.description:
From the colour of the dog waste size and colour, it would appear to be caused by the same dog. Unfortunately, I haven't seen either the dog or the owner. Fouling has occurred at least 5 times and it is still on the pavement. Some trodden in.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Cottage Field Close, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
